features.featureTitle: Fix the unhandled error that causes the app to crash and display 'Une erreur s'est produite / Erreur inconnue' before the authentication/login screen is even shown. The error is triggered during the app initialization phase (before Internet Identity loads), caught by the ErrorBoundary component, and renders the error card instead of the login page. Identify and fix the root cause in the initialization sequence (App.tsx, main.tsx, useInternetIdentity, or related bootstrap code) so the app reliably reaches the login screen on first load.
